title: Preserve Morphology Belt Driver Contracts
forbids: missing canonical morphology belt-driver contract references or direct mountain dependencies on retired Foundation driver products
why: Morphology coasts derive belt drivers from canonical Standard foundation tile artifacts; mountain planning consumes the Morphology-owned belt-driver artifact.
remediate: Require the three Standard foundation tile products in landmassPlates, provide morphologyArtifacts.beltDrivers there, and consume that belt-driver artifact from mountains.
message: Keep morphology belt-driver contracts wired to canonical artifacts.
